entry.title: New: RES25-118 (Honolulu) — CCL
entry.content:
RELATING TO THE TRANSFER OF FUNDS.

This resolution authorizes the transfer of $1 ,704,000 within the Department of Customer Services, reallocating salary savings to current expense to cover towing contracts for abandoned or derelict vehicles and law enforcement support for Fiscal Years 2023-25.

Latest action: Committee report and Resolution as amended were adopted.

View on the council site
